hooks.prompt: The model is about to run a git commit. Inject context instructing it to run a code review of the staged changes before committing. The model should check the available skills list for any code review skill and invoke it — if none exists, perform a manual review of the diff. Return JSON: {"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "additionalContext": "Before running this git commit, you MUST perform a code review of the staged changes first. Check your available skills for a code review skill and invoke it. If no such skill is available, manually review the staged diff for issues. Only proceed with the commit after the review is complete."}}
